name: Orange Peanut Butter Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the peanut butter until fluffy.
2. Gradually add the salad oil and orange juice, beating until smooth.
3. Add in the egg and sugar, mixing thoroughly.
4. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking powder; stir into the peanut butter mixture, blending well.
5. Stir in the grated orange rind.
6. Grease a 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
Makes one basic nice loaf.
